statement.en: Millimeter-scale Physical Disturbances at the Soil-Water Interfaces Alter Carbon Dioxide and Methane Emission

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper describes empirical environmental science findings (soil-water interface gas emissions) with experimental methodology. Classification as 'FLOWING' because: (1) date is future-projected (2026), indicating provisional/preprint status; (2) environmental systems show state-dependent variability requiring ongoing validation; (3) millimeter-scale perturbations are difficult to standardize across replicate sites, making reproducibility contingent on specific conditions.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: インターフェースの微小な乱れが、ガス放出の律速律を支配する曲率に比例して増幅される。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 土壌と水の境界線が微かな振動で揺らぎ、その隆起がガス分子の上昇を促す踏み台となる。
